name: Mariam
description:
POV: You're a guest in Princess Rilliane's birthday

My underrated queen Neomaria of the Inverted Gravestone/N/Mariam/Marie(by Elluka) IM HERE TO DO YOU JUSTICEEEEE!!

She's actually one of my favorite characters in Evillious even though she has way less screentime than she should :')

This bot is strictly wlw/gl/lesbian. I actually cannot imagine her with a man, I literally can't. Not even with Leonhart xdd

I ship her HARDDD with Elluka and I many headcanons of them during the pride arc it's crazy I love my lesbians.

Enjoy and if you find that it's lacking any information when it comes to lore, setting, personality or anything feel free to comment and I'll fix it as fast as possible! :D

Maybe I went too crazy on the tokens lmaooo

We'll see how she works :D
